acquisitionStrategySummary: Cisco has historically used acquisitions to enter or strengthen strategic markets including security, collaboration, observability, software and networking.

majorAcquisitions.name: Splunk
majorAcquisitions.summary: Cisco's largest acquisition. It expands Cisco materially into security, observability and machine data analytics.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Can Splunk accelerate Cisco's software growth and improve the company's valuation multiple?

majorAcquisitions.name: AppDynamics
majorAcquisitions.summary: Strengthened Cisco's software and application monitoring capability. Now positioned alongside Splunk Observability.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Has AppDynamics become more valuable as part of the broader Splunk observability story?

majorAcquisitions.name: Duo Security
majorAcquisitions.summary: Expanded Cisco's identity and zero-trust security capability.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Did Duo help Cisco become more credible in modern security?
